evidence.claim: ComfyUI-TBG-SAM3 A plug-and-play ComfyUI extension providing production-ready nodes for Meta’s SAM3 (Segment Anything Model 3) for text- or point-based segmentation, exhaustive mask generation, and pe
evidence.raw_snippet: ComfyUI-TBG-SAM3 A plug-and-play ComfyUI extension providing production-ready nodes for Meta’s SAM3 (Segment Anything Model 3) for text- or point-based segmentation, exhaustive mask generation, and per-segment or global depth mapping. All outputs are compatible with advanced segmentation packs such as Impact Pack SEGS and TBG-ETUR Upscaler Pro
